ddls:
CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the game session */,
  "room" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the game room */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the game session */,
  "num_players" INTEGER /* Number of players in the session */,
  "num_mobs_killed" INTEGER /* Number of mobs killed during the session */,
  "num_towers_killed" INTEGER /* Number of towers killed during the session */,
  "num_minibosses_killed" INTEGER /* Number of minibosses killed during the session */,
  "num_bosses_killed" INTEGER /* Number of bosses killed during the session */,
  "num_clicks" INTEGER /* Total number of clicks made by players */,
  "num_abilities_activated" INTEGER /* Number of abilities activated by players */,
  "num_players_reaching_milestone_level" INTEGER /* Number of players reaching milestone levels */,
  "num_ability_items_activated" INTEGER /* Number of ability items activated by players */,
  "num_active_players" INTEGER /* Number of active players in the session */,
  "time_simulating" REAL /* Time spent simulating the session */,
  "time_saving" REAL /* Time spent saving the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the session in seconds */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Name of the map or level */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the session */,
  "fps_average" REAL /* Average frames per second during the session */,
  "lag_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the game lagged */,
  "disconnect_count" INTEGER /* Number of times players disconnected */,
  "reconnect_count" INTEGER /* Number of times players reconnected */,
  "num_items_collected" INTEGER /* Number of items collected by players */,
  "num_quests_completed" INTEGER /* Number of quests completed by players */,
  "num_chest_opened" INTEGER /* Number of chests opened by players */,
  "num_traps_triggered" INTEGER /* Number of traps triggered by players */,
  "session_outcome" TEXT /* Result of the session */,
  "session_rating" INTEGER /* Player rating of the session */,
  "num_chat_messages" INTEGER /* Number of chat messages sent during the session */,
  "num_voice_chat_minutes" INTEGER /* Total minutes of voice chat used during the session */,
  "num_achievements_unlocked" INTEGER /* Number of achievements unlocked by players */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "player_level" INTEGER /* Level of the player */,
  "player_experience" INTEGER /* Current experience points of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)
